mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND role = 'admin'
SELECT id, username, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND role = 'admin'
mapper.update:
UPDATE user SET username = #{username},
password = #{password},
name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND role = 'admin'
